appliedUpdates.description: Added Webpack quirk about NODE_ENV not being set during config evaluation — must use function export with argv.mode instead. Added to .factory/library/architecture.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a size validation pattern example to the security-worker skill documentation, alongside the existing URL validation, path traversal, and hostname checking patterns. The export-progress-backup 5MB limit implementation (Buffer.byteLength + comparison) serves as a good reference.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature csp-dependency-cleanup had to implement the 5MB size check from scratch since no size validation pattern was documented in the skill. The pattern is: validate input size before processing, return { success: false, error: '...' } on rejection.
